description: Stepper workflow skill for the gamified KYB (Know Your Boomer_Ang) onboarding pipeline. Catches Paperform submissions and fans out to HubSpot, Slack, and the A.I.M.S LUC governance endpoint.

pipeline.name: Receive Paperform Payload
pipeline.description: Catches the raw guided-mode submission including all calculated outcomes.

pipeline.name: Fork: Risk-Based Routing
pipeline.description: Evaluate the Paperform outcomeScore to determine which parallel paths to execute.

pipeline.name: Component: HubSpot CRM Entry
pipeline.description: Standard-tier onboarding: push the new agent owner as a HubSpot contact with KYB metadata tags.

pipeline.name: Component: Slack Manual Review
pipeline.description: High-risk tier: ping #ops-review channel with the submission for human review before CRM entry.

inputMapping.message: 🚨 KYB High-Risk Onboarding: {{boomerAngName}} (Score: {{outcomeScore}}). Owner: {{ownerEmail}}. Review required before activation.

pipeline.name: Component: A.I.M.S LUC Governance Webhook
pipeline.description: MANDATORY for ALL paths. Fires the full payload to the A.I.M.S backend for Flight Recorder logging and Anchor Chain preparation.

pipeline.name: Confirmation Email
pipeline.description: Send a confirmation email to the owner with their new KYB serial ID.

inputMapping.subject: Your Boomer_Ang has been registered — {{serialId}}
inputMapping.body: Congratulations! Your agent '{{boomerAngName}}' has been assigned serial ID {{serialId}}. Risk classification: {{riskTier}}. You can view the Public Passport at: {{AIMS_APP_URL}}/kyb/charter/{{serialId}}

hubspot-contact-create.description: Reusable component: Creates or updates a HubSpot contact.

slack-ops-notification.description: Reusable component: Posts a formatted message to a Slack channel.

aims-luc-kyb-webhook.description: Reusable component: HTTP POST to the A.I.M.S KYB governance endpoint.
